title: HPC Repository Manifest
description: Minimal manifest that describes a constellation-aware repository for AI agents, CI, and tooling.

manifestVersion.description: Semantic version for this manifest format, e.g. 1.0.0.

repoName.description: Canonical repository name, matching the GitHub repo.

role.description: Short doctrinal role description for this repo.

paths.description: Allowed high-level paths for AI-generated artifacts and CI focus.

schemas.description: Root directories that contain JSON Schemas and contract definitions.

registry.description: Root directories that contain NDJSON or JSON registries.

docs.description: Documentation roots, safe for dense Markdown.

workflows.description: Locations of CI and automation workflows.

tooling.description: Helper scripts or libraries that integrate with contracts and registries.

schemas.description: Key schema files owned or mirrored by this repo.

path.description: Relative path to a schema file in this repo.

schemaref.description: Canonical schema ID or URI this file represents.

kind.description: Logical kind, e.g. invariants, metrics, contract, ai-authoring, registry-entry.

registries.description: Registry files that define IDs and references.

path.description: Relative path to a registry file.

entityType.description: Type of entities stored here, e.g. region, event, persona, style, vm-role.

ciProfiles.description: How this repo consumes shared CI/pre-commit packs.

importsSharedPack.description: Whether this repo imports the shared constellation CI pack.

workflows.description: Key workflow files that enforce schema/registry rules.

precommit.description: Local pre-commit hook configs or scripts, if any.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes for humans and tools.
